name: Regulatory Monitor
description: Scans regulatory feeds for new rules, proposed rules, guidance, and enforcement actions in a specified practice area and jurisdiction — applies a materiality filter and summarises what requires action.
promptTemplate: Monitor regulatory developments in {{practice_area}} for {{jurisdiction}} over the last {{lookback_days}} days. Identify: (1) new final rules or legislation in force, (2) proposed rules open for comment with deadlines, (3) significant enforcement actions or guidance. For each item, assess materiality to {{business_description}} and recommend whether to ACTION, MONITOR, or IGNORE.

substitutions.business_description: a B2B SaaS company processing EU personal data
